code: export const getBrowserNotificationPermission=()=>{if(typeof window==='undefined'||typeof window.Notification==='undefined'){return'unsupported';}return window.Notification.permission;};export const requestBrowserNotificationPermission=async()=>{if(typeof window==='undefined'||typeof window.Notification==='undefined'){return'unsupported';}return window.Notification.requestPermission();};export const showBrowserNotification=(title,body)=>{if(typeof window==='undefined'||typeof window.Notification==='undefined'||window.Notification.permission!=='granted'){return null;}return new window.Notification(title,{body});};
